author: feqifei 🇮🇹 [COOL] [CALM]
msg:
Additional procedure to extract 1,000 records from the manage.unitynodes.io page (after the website update it extracts only the first 20 by default)

1. Open DevTools (F12) → Go to Network tab.
2. Reload the page and find the request named rewards_get_allocations.
3. Right-click on that request row → Copy → Copy as fetch.
4. Go to Console tab.
5. Paste the code.
6. If Chrome says “Paste is not allowed”, type allow pasting, press Enter and paste the text again.
7. Make these two changes only:
    Change "take": 20 → "take": 1000
    Change "credentials": "include" → "credentials": "same-origin"

8. Press Enter.
9. Wait a few seconds → Move back to Network tab and copy the results that include 1,000 records from the second rewards_get_allocations

1. Open DevTools (F12) → Go to Network tab.
2. Reload the page and find the request named rewards_get_allocations.
3. Right-click on that request row → Copy → Copy as fetch.
4. Go to Console tab.
5. Paste the code.
6. If Chrome says “Paste is not allowed”, type allow pasting, press Enter and paste the text again.
7. Make these two changes only:
    Change "take": 20 → "take": 1000
    Change "credentials": "include" → "credentials": "same-origin"

8. Press Enter.
9. Wait a few seconds → Move back to Network tab and copy the results that include 1,000 records from the second rewards_get_allocations

author: OC Nodes
msg:
I think repeating the same questions and complaints over and over is really exhausting for all of us. We are all in this together and I definitely appreciate that some of us are very vocal and advocating on all our behalf but we gotta also let things play out a bit. We see improvements and action in the overall projects (WM and MN) so I mean Unity is not a scam unless it's one of those extremely elaborate scams.. the question is can they execute and or are we being too impatient and unrealistic with the timeline of what corporate customers will do with Unity and how fast etc. obviously they over sold the app and it wasn't ready to deploy. It's obvious by now. So we just have to accept the reality that we will get one task at a time.. S&R then the rest.. I personally saw a ULO make 50 UP on MapQuest but that means he submitted some 10 plans and that takes work...but $50 for someone in Pakistan is a shit ton of money to sit around at home and copy things into some forms.. so it's not for me.. j did one and got $5 and I was like ok that's interesting but not doing more now..

Anyway the bottom line is clearly the project has to roll one thing at a time then test and test and retest and wait for clients.. this will take months guys..  we better relax for our combined mental health..
